payload.answer: Notifying conflict between existing employment attribution (Sam works at Goldman) and new info (Sam left Goldman and joined Point72). Record the new message as a non-current timeline event to avoid asserting current employment.

entity_resolution.reason: No explicit unique identifier provided; treat 'Sam' as the same person as in the existing memory only for resolving the conflict at the statement level.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72 (timing not specified).

details: Recorded new employment change as a timeline event without asserting current employer.
